title: Ubiquiti UACC-Cable-PT-0.5M - UISP power TransPort cable, 0.5m
category: Powering / Power cables and adapters / DC cables
description: Power two-core outdoor DC cable from Ubiquiti from the UISP TransPort series of cables with special Power TransPort connectors on both sides and 0.5m long . The cable is very robust, contains 2 wires with a cross-section of AWG 12, and its white sheath is made of thermoplastic elastomer
